name: mismagent-method
description: mismAgent's local marketplace — agentic flow in three movements (explore -> model -> build), portable (generic core + per-project profile). The weight scales with the case: the core is enough for single-side; modules are enabled by necessity.

plugins.name: mismagent
plugins.description: The mismAgent KERNEL: dialogic explore (challenger/analyst), tactical model -> building-block manifest (types pinned at the boundaries), skill-matrix workers (realize-* + seam-in-process), Composer (merge=composition, D2 on the boundary). Enough on its own for single-side projects.

plugins.name: mismagent-cross-deploy
plugins.description: Module BY NECESSITY: cross-deploy boundaries (consumer and supplier on different sides). The port is projected into OpenAPI + generated types + CDC: skills seam-cross-deploy and mism-create-contract. Enable it ONLY if the profile declares multiple sides with boundaries between them.
